exploration_notes: The bug fix for failed-fetch reuse is already fully implemented in useLink.ts. The useLinkInner function (line 121) wraps the incoming fetchLink function with a caching layer (lines 155-173) that: (1) checks a linkFetchErrors ref cache keyed by shareId+linkId before making API calls, (2) throws the cached error immediately if found, (3) on API failure with RESPONSE_CODE.NOT_FOUND/NOT_ALLOWED/INVALID_ID, stores the error in the cache, and (4) auto-removes it via setTimeout after FAILING_FETCH_BAC
